headline: 3 Reasons to Sell RL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Ralph Lauren trades at $330.73 per share and has stayed on track with the overall market, gaining 5.1% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 was flat.

headline: A Look At Ralph Lauren (RL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: What Ralph Lauren’s Recent Share Performance Signals for Investors Ralph Lauren (RL) has drawn attention after recent share performance, with the stock down about 10% over the past month and past 3 months, even as its 1 year total return stands above 50%. See our latest analysis for Ralph Lauren. The recent 1 month and 3 month share price returns of about 10% lower indicate momentum has cooled, even though Ralph Lauren’s 1 year and multi year total shareholder returns remain very strong. headline: lululemon Q4 Earnings Ahead: Should Investors Buy the Stock Now?
summary: LULU heads into Q4 results with expectations of revenue and earnings declines, as margin pressure and softer North America demand offset holiday strength.
